column1: # Committed source-of-truth (lockfile-style): each cell -> its EXPECTED PASS/FAIL
# under the uniform gate (corr>=0.9999 AND sum_ratio in [0.999,1.001]). df64 is the
# clean parity baseline: it matches the CPU oracle on every cell EXCEPT the two
# curved-detector cells (cov_curved_det_on, curved_stress), which convict the D1
# curved-detector float/geometry hole. A cell whose ACTUAL verdict FLIPS vs this
# file (pass<->fail) is the regression signal; run.sh names the flipped cells.
# provenance: seeded from the validated desktop-5090 df64 run (63 PASS / 2 FAIL of 65).
# device: CUDA_DEVICE(active)=0 name="NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090" SMs=170 cc=12.0 totalGiB=31.8
# regenerate deliberately and review the diff, like cells/.
